transcript: Well, it's an interesting one of the seven gym sports that gymnastics has to offer. We don't see it at Olympic Games, but I'm really pleased to see it here today. And we're just going to see a little bit more here. A very interesting encore. Don't try this at home it's incredible oh my goodness there they are the acro boys from China Li Jiang, Ru Liming, Zhang Ting and Zhu Jiwei. What an inspired idea to bring them over to Rio. That was really worth it.
